Hibernate: create table activity_logs ( created_at datetime(6) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, user_id bigint, ip_address varchar(50), action varchar(255) not null, details TEXT, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table refresh_tokens ( expiry_date datetime(6) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, user_id bigint not null, token varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table teachers ( id bigint not null auto_increment, user_id bigint not null, department varchar(100) not null, designation varchar(100) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table users ( verified bit not null, created_at datetime(6) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, updated_at datetime(6), semester varchar(20), branch varchar(100), name varchar(100) not null, reset_token varchar(100), verification_token varchar(100), college varchar(150), email varchar(150) not null, password varchar(255) not null, photo_url varchar(255), role enum ('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_STUDENT','ROLE_TEACHER') not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table refresh_tokens add constraint UK7tdcd6ab5wsgoudnvj7xf1b7l unique testcase.name: testRegisterUser_DuplicateEmail
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.branch, u1_0.college, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.photo_url, u1_0.reset_token, u1_0.role, u1_0.semester, u1_0.updated_at, u1_0.verification_token, u1_0.verified from users u1_0 Hibernate: insert into users (branch, college, created_at, email, name, password, photo_url, reset_token, role, semester, updated_at, verification_token, verified) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-07-10 16:13:53 [main] INFO c.a.controller.AuthController [ReqId: 5d0b56c1-eedd-472f-a100-c7075c4f4bd8] - Received signup request for email: student@test.com Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? limit ? 2026-07-10 16:13:53 [main] WARN c.a.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler [ReqId: 5d0b56c1-eedd-472f-a100-c7075c4f4bd8] - Bad request: Email is already registered
